professional_headline: Azure Data Engineer | End-to-End Data Platform Builder | From Business Context to Technical Delivery
professional_summary: Azure Data Engineer with a strong hands-on approach to building scalable data platforms from ingestion to analytics. Experienced in transforming operational data into structured, decision-ready datasets using Azure Data Factory, Databricks, Data Lake, Azure SQL, and Power BI. My career combines technical execution with strong communication and business understanding, developed from a non-traditional background. I validate architecture through real implementation, solving real-world cloud challenges including CI/CD, authentication, permissions, and infrastructure deployment.

career_journey.summary: Started in a creative and communication-driven environment before transitioning into data engineering. This background enables a strong ability to translate business needs into technical solutions and communicate complex data concepts clearly.
career_journey.previous_background: Background in performing arts and communication (Brazil), which developed presentation, storytelling, and stakeholder interaction skills.
career_journey.transition: Transitioned into data and technology, building expertise in data engineering, analytics, and cloud platforms, and later moving to Europe to further develop technical and language skills.

value_proposition: Hands-on Azure Data Engineer capable of delivering from infrastructure to analytics
Strong ability to connect business context with technical implementation
Practical mindset: build, test, debug, and validate solutions in real environments
Experience handling real deployment challenges including CI/CD, authentication, and cloud provisioning
Able to design scalable and reusable data architectures

professional_experience.summary: Worked in a large-scale energy environment delivering data solutions for operational monitoring, reporting, and analytics.
responsibilities_and_impact: Developed and maintained data pipelines for operational and business data processing
Automated KPI generation, reducing manual reporting effort and improving data reliability
Delivered daily and monthly reports supporting operational decision-making
Analyzed discrepancies between planned and executed operations to identify inefficiencies
Correlated multiple datasets to support root cause analysis and process improvements
Collaborated with business and IT teams to gather requirements and deliver data solutions
Supported continuous improvements in data processes and reporting structures

professional_experience.summary: Developing personal and portfolio projects focused on Azure Data Engineering and cloud-based data platforms.
responsibilities_and_impact: Designed and implemented end-to-end Azure data platform simulations
Built CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Infrastructure as Code (Bicep)
Worked with Azure services including Data Factory, Databricks, Data Lake, and SQL Database
Simulated real-world deployment issues such as authentication failures, permissions, and resource conflicts
Structured scalable architectures with Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers
Created technical documentation and storytelling for portfolio and interviews

selected_projects.name: Azure Data Platform – End-to-End Heavy Simulation
selected_projects.summary: Full cloud data platform built and deployed on Azure to simulate a real enterprise architecture.
highlights: Created CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
Handled real deployment errors and debugging

education.program: Master in Big Data and Artificial Intelligence

career_positioning.strength_statement: I learn and deliver by building. My strength is turning architecture into real, working solutions.
career_positioning.market_message: Strong candidate for Azure Data Engineer roles requiring hands-on delivery and cloud problem-solving.
career_positioning.next_step_goal: To work on scalable Azure data platforms in production environments across Europe.

interview_hook: I don’t rely only on theory. I build the solution, make it work, and then I can explain it clearly because I’ve been hands-on through the entire process.
